statement: In every magma, Equation 3049 (`x = ((y * (z * w)) * u) * v`) implies Equation 82 (`x = y * (z * (x * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0277
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z w)) u) v)) :
    ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op y (op z (op x x)))
